title: Define an application repository port
scenario: Application code depends on domain types and port traits, not concrete database clients.
instructions: Define an application module with a UserRepository trait that checks for email existence and saves a NewUser.

hints.body: Keep the Register user use case boundaries code active and define an application module with a UserRepository trait that checks for email existence and saves a NewUser.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Define an application repository port is shown below.

completionExplanation: Define an application repository port now extends the active Register user use case boundaries code with register repository port. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
